case_title: JOHN CRANDON ET AL VS. AIR PACIFIC LIMITED

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY CRANDON, JOHN CRANDON, JOYCE AS TO DEFENDANT AIR PACIFIC LIMITED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIR PACIFIC LIMITED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOHN CRANDON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF JOYCE CRANDON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIR PACIFIC LIMITED IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PETERS SEARES. FILING OF ZOOM REQUEST WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2021 - JUDGMENT.
